common.loadFailed: Failed to load. Please check your connection and try again.

signin.title: Welcome to Resume Maker
signin.subtitle: Staff sign-in (Google account)
signin.note: Staff only. Applicants: please open the URL sent by our staff.

upload.title: Take a photo of your Residence Card
upload.hint: Make sure the whole front side of the card is visible
upload.processingNote: Check the photo, then tap Next

a.ocrFailed: We could not read the card. Please enter your information manually.

form.title: Check your information
form.subtitle: We filled in the fields from your card. Fix any mistakes and fill in the rest.
form.lowConfidence: Please double-check this field — it may not have been read correctly.
form.manualInputRequired: Please fill in all fields yourself.

done.title: Submitted successfully
done.message: Thank you! Our staff will review your information and finish your resume. You can close this page.

expired.title: This link has expired
expired.message: Please ask our staff to send you a new link.

submitted.title: Already submitted
submitted.message: If you need to make changes, please contact our staff.

placeholders.furigana: グエン バン アー

admin.title: Resume Maker Admin
admin.subtitle: Register applicants, issue invite URLs, review submissions

landing.tooMany: Too many requests. Please try again in a few minutes.
landing.startFailed: Could not start. Please check your connection and try again.
landing.noCaMessage: This page can only be used via a link from your Career Advisor (CA). Please contact your CA to get the URL.

form.title: Edit your information
form.subtitle: Review what you submitted, fix anything that's wrong, and save.

invalid.message: This URL is invalid. Please contact your CA to have a new URL issued.

done.urlLabel: Edit URL (use this if you need to make changes later)
done.urlNote: Please take a screenshot of this URL or save it somewhere safe.
done.fallbackMessage: We could not issue an edit URL. Please contact your CA if you need to make changes.
